```{r}
Meco_16S_Funcx  <- trans_func$new(Meco_16S_Funcx)
Meco_16S_Funcx$cal_spe_func(prok_database = "FAPROTAX")
Func16Sx         <- as.data.frame(Meco_16S_Funcx$res_spe_func)

Meco_16S_Funcx$cal_spe_func_perc(abundance_weighted = TRUE, perc = FALSE, dec = 8)
Func16SxPerc     <- as.data.frame(Meco_16S_Funcx$res_spe_func_perc)

# creating order from chaos
Ord16STest      <- Meco_16S_Rare$clone()
Ord16STest      <- Ord16STest$merge_samples("topology")
Ord16STest$cal_betadiv(method = "jaccard")
Ord16SBeta      <- trans_beta$new(dataset = Ord16STest, measure = "jaccard")
Ord16SBeta$cal_ordination(method = "PCoA")
Scores          <- scores(Ord16SBeta$res_ordination, choices = c(1,2), display = "sites")
Order16SGroup   <- Ord16STest$sample_names()[order(radial_theta(Scores))]

rm(Ord16STest, Ord16SBeta, Scores)

# plot

Meco_16S_Funcx$plot_spe_func_perc(add_facet = TRUE,
                                 order_x = Order16SGroup) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#FF0000", mid = "#CCFFFF", high = "#001A1A",midpoint = 0.00001, na.value = "#FF0000")+
    labs(title = "Heatmap of functional diversity grouped by topology (16S data)")

write.csv(Func16SxPerc, paste(datafolder,"Functional_analysis_ASV/ASV_16S_Func_topology.csv")
ggsave(paste(datafolder,"Functional_analysis_ASV/ASV_16S_Func_topology.png"), device = png, width = 2000, height = 1200, units = "px", dpi = 144, limitsize = FALSE)

#Meco_16S_Rare$sample_table$group <- paste(Meco_16S_Rare$sample_table$city, #Meco_16S_Rare$sample_table$topology, sep = "_")

# Merged By group
Meco_16S_Funcx  <- Meco_16S_Rare$merge_samples("topology")

Meco_16S_Funcx  <- trans_func$new(Meco_16S_Funcx)
Meco_16S_Funcx$cal_spe_func(prok_database = "FAPROTAX")
Func16Sx         <- as.data.frame(Meco_16S_Funcx$res_spe_func)

Meco_16S_Funcx$cal_spe_func_perc(abundance_weighted = TRUE, perc = FALSE, dec = 8)
Func16SxPerc     <- as.data.frame(Meco_16S_Funcx$res_spe_func_perc)

# creating order from chaos
Ord16STest      <- Meco_16S_Rare$clone()
Ord16STest      <- Ord16STest$merge_samples("topology")
Ord16STest$cal_betadiv(method = "jaccard")
Ord16SBeta      <- trans_beta$new(dataset = Ord16STest, measure = "jaccard")
Ord16SBeta$cal_ordination(method = "PCoA")
Scores<- scores(Ord16SBeta$res_ordination, choices = c(1,2), display = "sites")
Order16SGroup   <- Ord16STest$sample_names()[order(radial_theta(Scores))]

rm(Ord16STest, Ord16SBeta, Scores)

library(viridis)
library(scales)
# plot
Meco_16S_Funcx$res_spe_func_perc_trans$value <- ifelse(Meco_16S_Funcx$res_spe_func_perc_trans$value==NA,0,Meco_16S_Funcx$res_spe_func_perc_trans$value)

Meco_16S_Funcx$plot_spe_func_perc(add_facet = TRUE,
                                 order_x = Order16SGroup) +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "viridis", na.value = "white")+
    labs(title = "Heatmap of functional diversity grouped by city and topology (16S data)")

Meco_16S_Funcx$plot_spe_func_perc(add_facet = TRUE,
                                  order_x = Order16SGroup) +
  scale_fill_viridis(
    option = "viridis",
    values = rescale(c(0, 0.002, 0.01, 0.3)),  # more detail in the low range
    na.value = "white",
    direction = -1                             # optional: reverse if needed
  ) +
  labs(title = "Heatmap of functional diversity grouped by city and topology (16S data)")

bold_labels <- function(labels, to_bold) {
  sapply(labels, function(label) {
    if (label %in% to_bold) {
      label <- paste0("*", label)
      bquote(bold(.(label)))
    } else {
      label
    }
  })
}
rows_to_make_bold <- as.list(names(signif_functions))

Meco_16S_Funcx$plot_spe_func_perc(add_facet = TRUE,
                                  order_x = c("sidewalk with trees", "sidewalk without trees", "street with trees", "street without trees", "Tree pit")) +
  scale_fill_viridis(
  option = "viridis",
  values = rescale(c(0, 0.002, 0.01, 0.3)),
  breaks = c(0, 0.005, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.3),
  labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 0.1),
  na.value = "white",
  direction = -1,
  guide = guide_colorbar(barheight = 40, barwidth = 1)
)+
  scale_y_discrete(labels = bold_labels(colnames(Meco_16S_Funcx$res_spe_func), rows_to_make_bold)) +  
  labs(title = "Heatmap of functional diversity grouped by city and topology (16S data)")




  #write.csv(Func16SxPerc, paste(datafolder,"Functional_analysis_ASV/ASV_16S_Func_City_and_topology.csv")
ggsave(paste(datafolder,"Functional_analysis_ASV/ASV_16S_Func_city_and_topology_viridis_test.png"), device = png, width = 2000, height = 2400, units = "px", dpi = 144, limitsize = FALSE)
```

#### Statistics

```{r}

library(rstatix)
## We make a dataframe with metadata and functional data combined.
func_table_with_meta <- cbind(Func16SPerc, as.data.frame(physeq_filtered_16s@sam_data))
write.csv(func_table_with_meta ,paste(datafolder,"/Functional_analysis_ASV/test_functional_table_merged.csv")

# Run Kruskal-Wallis test for each function, based on topology. KW because not all values are normally distributed and we should not combine tests.
kw_results <- apply(func_table_with_meta[1:ncol(Func16SPerc)], 2, function(x) kruskal.test(x ~ func_table_with_meta$topology)$p.value)

# Adjust p-values for multiple testing (Benjamini-Hochberg)
kw_results_adj <- p.adjust(kw_results, method = "BH")

# View top significant functions
signif_functions <- sort(kw_results_adj[kw_results_adj < 0.05])
names(signif_functions)
str(names(signif_functions))
func_table_signif <- func_table[,names(signif_functions)]



# Practise to do all pairwise comps.
# for (i in 1:length(names(func_table_signif))){
#   name <- names(signif_functions)[i]
#   pairwise_result <- pairwise_wilcox_test(
#     data.frame(value = func_table_signif[,i], group = category),
#     value ~ group,
#     p.adjust.method = "BH"
#     )
#   pairwise_result_list[name]<- pairwise_result
# }
#   pairwise_result



func_table_signif_merge <-  merge(func_table_signif,physeq_filtered_16s@sam_data,by="row.names",all.x=TRUE)
rownames(func_table_signif_merge) <- func_table_signif_merge$Row.names
func_table$Row.names <- NULL
#One keeps giving an error, so I decided to just remove it.
#names(signif_functions[56])
results_list <- list()
for (func in colnames(func_table_signif)) {
  print(func)
  # Perform pairwise test
  test <- func_table_signif_merge %>%
    dunn_test(as.formula(paste(func, "~ topology")), p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
    add_significance()
  
  # Add median direction info
  median_vals <- func_table_signif_merge %>%
    group_by(topology) %>%
    summarise(med = median(.data[[func]], na.rm = TRUE))
  
  test <- test %>%
    left_join(median_vals, by = c("group1" = "topology")) %>%
    rename(med1 = med) %>%
    left_join(median_vals, by = c("group2" = "topology")) %>%
    rename(med2 = med) %>%
    mutate(direction = case_when(
      p.adj < 0.05 & med1 > med2 ~ paste(group1, ">", group2),
      p.adj < 0.05 & med1 < med2 ~ paste(group1, "<", group2),
      TRUE ~ "NS"
    )) %>%
    mutate(Function = func)
  
  results_list[[func]] <- test
}

# Combine all test results
all_results <- bind_rows(results_list)

write.csv(all_results, paste(datafolder,"/Functional_analysis_ASV/pairwise_comparison_functions_topology.csv")

```

### ITS

```{r}
# Having switched to Microeco for functional trait analysis, most of the ITS process has been commented out.

# # FungalTraits
# # extracting the taxtable from phyloseq (rarefied)
# TAXITS <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ASV_ITS_Rare))
# TAXITS1 <- TAXITS
# 
# # Adding guild annotation
# TAXITS1$Genus <- gsub("g__", "", TAXITS1$Genus)
# TAXITS1$Guild <- as.factor(Fungaltraits$guild_fg[match(TAXITS1$Genus, Fungaltraits$Genus)])
# TAXITS1 <- TAXITS1[,c(8,1,2,3,4,5,6,7)]
# # guild has 36 levels
# 
# #new phyloseq
# TAXITS1 <- tax_table(as.matrix(TAXITS1))
# ASV_ITS_Func1 <- phyloseq(otu_table(ASV_ITS_Rare),TAXITS1,Treetment)
# rm(TAXITS1)

library(file2meco)
library(microeco)
#Microeco. Note that these have a more recent database
Meco_ITS_Rare   <- phyloseq2meco(physeq_fungal_only)
Meco_ITS_Func   <- trans_func$new(Meco_ITS_Rare)
Meco_ITS_Func$cal_spe_func(fungi_database = "FungalTraits")
FuncITS         <- as.data.frame(Meco_ITS_Func$res_spe_func)
sum(rowSums(FuncITS, na.rm = F) == 0)
sum(rowSums(FuncITS, na.rm = F) != 0)
sum(rowSums(FuncITS, na.rm = F) != 0)/length(rownames(FuncITS))
# Coverage has improved to 37% (at 14.000 annotations)
```

#### Heath_map

```{r}
# FungalTraits x Microeco
# Calculating percentage coverage and making a heatmap
Meco_ITS_Func$cal_spe_func_perc(abundance_weighted = TRUE, perc = FALSE, dec = 8)
FuncITSPerc     <- as.data.frame(Meco_ITS_Func$res_spe_func_perc)

## extracting ordination coordinates and calculating radial theta
OrdITSTest      <- Meco_ITS_Rare$clone()
OrdITSTest$cal_betadiv(method = "bray")
OrdITSBeta      <- trans_beta$new(dataset = OrdITSTest, group = "topology", measure = "bray")
OrdITSBeta$cal_ordination(method = "PCoA")
Scores          <- scores(OrdITSBeta$res_ordination, choices = c(1,2), display = "sites")
OrderITS        <- OrdITSTest$sample_names()[order(radial_theta(Scores))]

rm(OrdITSTest, OrdITSBeta, Scores)

Meco_ITS_Func$plot_spe_func_perc(add_facet = TRUE,
                                 order_x = OrderITS)+
    scale_fill_gradient2(mid = "#FFCC99", high = "#1A0D00", na.value = "#FF0000")+
    labs(title = "Heatmap of functional diversity (ITS data)")
ggsave("ASV_ITS_Func_Heat_test.png", device = png, width = 2000, height = 1500, units = "px", dpi = 144, limitsize = FALSE)
ggsave("ASV_ITS_Func_Heat2.png", device = png, width = 6000, height = 1500, units = "px", dpi = 144, limitsize = FALSE)
# note that B077 on the right 10th percentile has very low fungal species richness and low functional percentages

# Merged By city and topology
Meco_ITS_Funcx  <- Meco_ITS_Rare$merge_samples("topology")
Meco_ITS_Funcx  <- trans_func$new(Meco_ITS_Funcx)

Meco_ITS_Funcx$cal_spe_func(fungi_database = "FungalTraits")
FuncITSx         <- as.data.frame(Meco_ITS_Funcx$res_spe_func)

Meco_ITS_Funcx$cal_spe_func_perc(abundance_weighted = TRUE, perc = FALSE, dec = 8)
FuncITSxPerc     <- as.data.frame(Meco_ITS_Funcx$res_spe_func_perc)

# Order in the court
OrdITSTest      <- Meco_ITS_Rare$clone()
OrdITSTest      <- OrdITSTest$merge_samples("topology")
OrdITSTest$cal_betadiv(method = "bray")
OrdITSBeta      <- trans_beta$new(dataset = OrdITSTest, measure = "bray")
OrdITSBeta$cal_ordination(method = "PCoA")
Scores          <- scores(OrdITSBeta$res_ordination, choices = c(1,2), display = "sites")
OrderITSGroup   <- OrdITSTest$sample_names()[order(radial_theta(Scores))]

rm(OrdITSTest, OrdITSBeta, Scores)

Meco_ITS_Funcx$plot_spe_func_perc(add_facet = TRUE,
                                 order_x = OrderITSGroup) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(mid = "#FFCC99", high = "#1A0D00", na.value = "#FF0000")+
    labs(title = "Heatmap of functional diversity grouped by substrate (ITS data)")


ggsave("ASV_ITS_Func_city_and_topology_test.png", device = png, width = 2000, height = 1500, units = "px", dpi = 144, limitsize = FALSE)


# Merged By topology
Meco_ITS_Funcx  <- Meco_ITS_Rare$merge_samples("topology")
Meco_ITS_Funcx  <- trans_func$new(Meco_ITS_Funcx)

Meco_ITS_Funcx$cal_spe_func(fungi_database = "FungalTraits")
FuncITSx         <- as.data.frame(Meco_ITS_Funcx$res_spe_func)

Meco_ITS_Funcx$cal_spe_func_perc(abundance_weighted = TRUE, perc = FALSE, dec = 8)
FuncITSxPerc     <- as.data.frame(Meco_ITS_Funcx$res_spe_func_perc)

# Order in the court
OrdITSTest      <- Meco_ITS_Rare$clone()
OrdITSTest      <- OrdITSTest$merge_samples("topology")

OrdITSTest$cal_betadiv(method = "jaccard")
OrdITSBeta      <- trans_beta$new(dataset = OrdITSTest, measure = "jaccard")
OrdITSBeta$cal_ordination(method = "PCoA")
Scores          <- scores(OrdITSBeta$res_ordination, choices = c(1,2), display = "sites")
OrderITSGroup   <- OrdITSTest$sample_names()[order(radial_theta(Scores))]

rm(OrdITSTest, OrdITSBeta, Scores)


```

#### Statistics

```{r}
# Assuming your function table is `func_table` and metadata is `meta_table`
# Ensure rows in func_table match sample order in meta_table
func_table <- FuncITSPerc[rownames(physeq_fungal_only@sam_data), ]
category <- as.factor(physeq_fungal_only@sam_data$city)

# Run Kruskal-Wallis test for each function
kw_results <- apply(func_table, 2, function(x) kruskal.test(x ~ category)$p.value)

# Adjust p-values for multiple testing (e.g., Benjamini-Hochberg)
kw_results_adj <- p.adjust(kw_results, method = "BH")

# View top significant functions
signif_functions <- sort(kw_results_adj[kw_results_adj < 0.05])
names(signif_functions)
str(names(signif_functions))
func_table_signif <- func_table[,names(signif_functions)]

library(rstatix)

func_table_signif_merge <-  merge(func_table_signif,phy_rare@sam_data,by="row.names",all.x=TRUE)
rownames(func_table_signif_merge) <- func_table_signif_merge$Row.names
func_table$Row.names <- NULL
names(func_table_signif_merge) <- make.names(names(func_table_signif_merge))
names(func_table_signif) <- make.names(names(func_table_signif))
results_list <- list()
for (func in colnames(func_table_signif)) {
  print(func)
  # Perform pairwise test
  test <- func_table_signif_merge %>%
    dunn_test(as.formula(paste(func, "~ topology")), p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
    add_significance()
  
  # Add median direction info
  median_vals <- func_table_signif_merge %>%
    group_by(topology) %>%
    summarise(med = median(.data[[func]], na.rm = TRUE))
  
  test <- test %>%
    left_join(median_vals, by = c("group1" = "topology")) %>%
    rename(med1 = med) %>%
    left_join(median_vals, by = c("group2" = "topology")) %>%
    rename(med2 = med) %>%
    mutate(direction = case_when(
      p.adj < 0.05 & med1 > med2 ~ paste(group1, ">", group2),
      p.adj < 0.05 & med1 < med2 ~ paste(group1, "<", group2),
      TRUE ~ "NS"
    )) %>%
    mutate(Function = func)
  
  results_list[[func]] <- test
}

# Combine all test results
all_results <- bind_rows(results_list)

write.csv(all_results,"ITS_pairwise_comparison_functions.csv")

```

Run after stats

```{r}
# Meco_ITS_Funcx$plot_spe_func_perc(add_facet = TRUE,
#                                  order_x = OrderITSGroup) +
#     scale_fill_gradient2(mid = "#FFCC99", high = "#1A0D00", na.value = "#FF0010")+
#     labs(title = "Heatmap of functional diversity grouped by substrate (ITS data)")
bold_labels <- function(labels, to_bold) {
  sapply(labels, function(label) {
    if (label %in% to_bold) {
      label <- paste0("*", label)
      bquote(bold(.(label)))
    } else {
      bquote(.(label))
    }
  }, simplify = FALSE)
}

rows_to_make_bold <- sub(".*\\|", "", names(signif_functions))
intersect(colnames(Meco_ITS_Funcx$res_spe_func), rows_to_make_bold)
clean_labels <- sub(".*\\|", "", colnames(Meco_ITS_Funcx$res_spe_func))
sig_funcs <- intersect(rows_to_make_bold, colnames(Meco_ITS_Funcx$res_spe_func))

sig_matrix <- Meco_ITS_Funcx$res_spe_func[, sig_funcs, drop = FALSE]

tmp <- Meco_ITS_Funcx
tmp$res_spe_func <- sig_matrix


tmp$plot_spe_func_perc(add_facet = TRUE,
                       order_x = c("Treepit", "Sidewalk_with_trees", "Street_with_trees", "Sidewalk_without_trees", "Street_without_trees")) +
  scale_fill_viridis(
    option = "viridis",
    values = rescale(c(0, 0.1, 0.4, 0.8)),
    labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 0.5),
    na.value = "white",
    direction = 1,
    guide = guide_colorbar(barheight = 40, barwidth = 1)
  ) +
  labs(title = "Heatmap of significant functional diversity (ITS data)") +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14)   # increase function label size
  )

ggsave("ASV_ITS_Functopology_viridis_significant_only.png", device = png, width = 15, height = 26, units = "in", dpi = 144, limitsize = FALSE)
```

```{r}
rows_to_keep <- unique(rows_to_make_bold)

tmp <- Meco_ITS_Funcx
tmp$res_spe_func <- Meco_ITS_Funcx$res_spe_func[, 
                     colnames(Meco_ITS_Funcx$res_spe_func) %in% rows_to_keep]

tmp$plot_spe_func_perc(add_facet = TRUE,
                       order_x = OrderITSGroup) +
  scale_fill_viridis(
    option = "viridis",
    values = rescale(c(0, 0.1, 0.3, 0.8)),
    labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 0.1),
    na.value = "white",
    direction = 1,
    guide = guide_colorbar(barheight = 40, barwidth = 1)
  ) +
  labs(title = "Heatmap of significant functional diversity grouped by topology (ITS data)") +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14))

ggsave("ASV_ITS_Functopology_viridis_significant_only_test.png", device = png, width = 15, height = 26, units = "in", dpi = 144, limitsize = FALSE)
```
